1.title: Senior Developer
1.Description:
● Drive end-to-end development, support, and release execution across two core insurance systems: a legacy enterprise application built on .NET Framework and a modern cloud-native ecosystem utilizing a 5-microservice .NET Core backend and React frontend.
● Provide technical governance and quality assurance by reviewing the architectural and code contributions of peer Senior Developers to ensure system reliability and alignment with SOLID standards.
● Author automated test coverage with Jest and Testing Library plus Playwright end-to-end tests, and perform manual testing across dev, UAT, and production environments — owning quality end-to-end without a dedicated QA team.
● Migrated legacy codebase repositories from SVN to GitHub and authored 'claude.md' developer guidelines to integrate Claude Code and GitHub Copilot into daily development, raising delivery velocity and code quality.
● Actively participate in and guide Agile ceremonies, including daily stand-ups, backlog grooming, and sprint refinements to maintain high delivery velocity.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.Description:
● Optimized a global contingent workforce system by contributing to the Vue 3 migration, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.
● Engineered a secure RESTful API for background check integrations, handling sensitive data for global enterprise clients.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Maintained and troubleshot a supply chain management system, diagnosing and resolving client-reported defects across front-end and back-end layers to ensure business continuity.
● Developed bug fixes and feature enhancements using HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), and C#, maintaining high code quality and system stability.
● Managed source code versioning and branching strategies using TFS, Azure DevOps, and Git.
● Maintained and optimized client databases in SQL Server and Oracle DB, authoring queries and stored procedures to ensure data integrity and performance.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed and maintained internal web applications using ASP.NET, C#, Angular, and Oracle SQL, supporting the firm's audit and advisory practice operations.
● Built and optimized database stored procedures and complex queries using Oracle PL/SQL and SQL Server to support reporting and data management requirements.
● Collaborated with senior engineers to deliver bug fixes and feature enhancements within defined sprint timelines.
● Utilized Azure DevOps for source control, branch management, code reviews, and CI/CD pipeline execution.

0.Title: Higher Education Digital Transformation Ecosystem
